allow: Bash(powershell -Command 'Get-Process | Where-Object { $_.Name -match '\\''widget|dotnet'\\'' } | Select-Object Id, Name, CPU | Format-Table -AutoSize')
Bash(powershell -Command "Get-Process WidgetDesktop -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Id, Name")

Bash(powershell -Command "Stop-Process -Name 'WidgetDesktop' -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Stop-Process -Name 'widget-api' -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Stop-Process -Name 'dotnet' -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue")
